testcase.name: TC10_modifierAdministrateurEcole

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //span[contains(@class,'fi-sidebar-item-label') and normalize-space()='Schools'] to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//span[contains(@class,'fi-sidebar-item-label') and normalize-space()='Schools']"}. (tried for 15 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.43.0', revision: 'dd0f534' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.168, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.167 (65db666ac2c..., userDataDir: C:\Users\pc\AppData\Local\T...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51489}, goog:processID: 10024, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51489/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.168, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 56d1e35d5539dafe3d3f5148405220a3
